delivery_remote.evidence: University of Malta offers online/blended degree programmes via its eLearning provision.

reason.text: International enrolment surged to 37% of tertiary students in 2023-24 (up ~27% in one year) on the back of English-medium teaching, competitive fees and post-study work routes; the national education strategy 2024-2030 and Malta's first Professional Doctorate in Education (2024) deepened the offer.

cost_funding.tuition_note: EU students largely state-funded; non-EU undergraduate fees broadly EUR 10,000-12,000/yr depending on programme.

missing_features.text: Research output and global ranking lag advanced neighbours; strength is concentrated in medical training rather than broad R&D.
Policy uncertainty: proposed limits on foreign students at state universities.

youth_motivators.text: Affordable, English-taught medical degrees with early clinical exposure across a wide hospital network.
US-style STEM programmes via international university partnerships in Tbilisi.

missing_features.text: No globally top-ranked research university (best CWUR 2025 rank ~1,622).
Narrow research base relative to advanced EU neighbours; limited PhD-scale STEM depth.

youth_motivators.text: English-medium degrees inside the EU with comparatively low tuition and post-study work rights.
Small, safe Anglophone Mediterranean campus drawing students from 127 countries.

universal_approach.note: Candidate levers = feature tags common among the strongest 5y improvers. Statistical association is computed in correlate.py (insights page).

sensitivity.note: 25/30 countries shared between min-max and z-score top-30 (5y).

institutions.name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
institutions.feature: STEM, AI and quantum research leader

correlation.multiple_comparisons: 2 features tested; treat single p-values cautiously (Bonferroni alpha ~ 0.025).
correlation.disclaimer: Observational association, not causation. Small n; interpret as directional.
correlation.note_institution_level: Seed uses country-level tags (derived from each country's top institution). Institution-level regression is enabled once per-institution tags are populated.
